title: From Prompts to Pavement Through Time: Temporal Grounding in Agentic Scene-to-Plan Reasoning
summary:
arXiv:2605.19824v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Recent attempts to support high-level scene interpretation and planning in Autonomous Vehicles (AVs) using ensembles of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) continue to treat time as a secondary property. This lack of temporal grounding leads to inconsistencies in reasoning about continuous actions, undermining both safety and interpretability.
